text:
On Wed, Aug 06, 2008 at 03:16:47AM +0400, Dmitry Marakasov wrote:
> > From:	Romain TartiÃ¨re <romain@blogreen.org>
> > MAINTAINER=	romain@marvin.blogreen.org
> 
> Are you sure email in MAINTAINER is correct?
> 
> It's confusing when maintainer mails from email address different
> to what is specified in the port.

Oops!

I moved my home directory and forgot to restore my ~/.porttools :-/

Could you please make the following changes to the Makefile:
 - Change my e-mail address to romain@blogreen.org (Whom + MAINTAINER=);
 - Remove accent from my last name (Whom).

All my apologies for this,
Romain
